title: The Hunger Games: The Ballad of Songbirds & Snakes
subTitle: In war-torn Panem, an 18-year-old Coriolanus Snow mentors Lucy Gray Baird, a tribute for the Hunger Games. However, as he starts bonding with Lucy, Snow's fate takes a drastic turn.

title: Hunt to Kill
subTitle: Jim Rhodes, a U.S. Border Patrol agent, stays with his rebellious daughter in the mountains of Montana. However, things go south when the father-daughter duo are kidnapped by a crew of insane thugs in the wilderness.

title: The Big Bang
subTitle: A private detective strives to find a missing stripper, but everyone he questions end up dead. This soon brings him in contact with an odd billionaire who wants to recreate the Big Bang.

title: Recoil
subTitle: When his family is killed by a notorious gang, Ryan Varett, a former police officer, suits up to seek revenge against the perpetrators.

title: Tracers
subTitle: Cam, a bike messenger, is wanted by the Chinese mafia, and he is on the run while learning parkour after crashing into a beautiful woman.

title: The LEGO Movie
subTitle: Emmet, an ordinary individual prophesied to be the Special, is entrusted with the responsibility of saving the Lego world from the cruel ways of Lord Business.

title: Now You See Me
subTitle: Four magicians who perform on streets steal a tremendous amount of money that belongs to an insurance magnate while they are pursued by police authorities.

title: Rambo III
subTitle: When his former superior, Colonel Samuel, asks him to join him on a special mission in Afghanistan, Rambo declines. However, when he is held hostage and tortured, Rambo decides to step in.

title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
subTitle: Peter Parker faces Electro and his old friend who is dying and looks out for Spider-Man's blood in order to cure himself.

title: Aquaman
subTitle: Half-human, half-Atlantean Arthur is born with the ability to communicate with marine creatures. He goes on a quest to retrieve the legendary Trident of Atlan and protect the water world.

title: Bumblebee
subTitle: During the Cybertron Civil War, Optimus Prime sends Autobot scout B-127 to Earth to form a base where they can regroup. Later, the scout befriends a girl named Charlie, who names him Bumblebee.

title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
subTitle: As a powerful crime lord threatens New York City, a team of mutant turtles trained in martial arts tries to leave their hidden lair to defend their beloved home from impending danger.

title: Ghost Rider: Spirit of Vengeance
subTitle: A French monk seeks out the Ghost Rider, a superpowered antihero, for help in protecting a young boy who is being pursued by the Devil and his minions.

title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
subTitle: After years of being at odds with each other, the birds and the pigs are forced to work together when a common enemy attempts to drive them away from their homes.

title: Sherlock Holmes: A Game of Shadows
subTitle: While investigating a string of crimes in Europe, Sherlock Holmes is led to Professor Moriarty. Determined to foil his evil plans, Sherlock and Dr Watson pursue him across the continent.

title: Sherlock Holmes: A Game of Shadows
subTitle: While investigating a string of crimes in Europe, Sherlock Holmes is led to Professor Moriarty. Determined to foil his evil plans, Sherlock and Dr Watson pursue him across the continent.

title: Red Dawn
subTitle: A soldier and his brother escape into the woods when their city is invaded by North Korean paratroopers. After their father is killed, the brothers form a guerrilla group to fight back.

title: The Love Laugh Live Show
subTitle: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.

title: The Love Laugh Live Show
subTitle: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.

title: Hours
subTitle: Nolan Hayes faces challenges to keep Abigail, his newborn daughter who is on a ventilator, alive when Hurricane Katrina impacts the functionality and electricity of the hospital.

title: Lady Bloodfight
subTitle: Jane, an American girl travelling in Hong Kong, gets into a physical altercation with three robbers where she defends herself. A martial artist, who observes the event, trains her for a competition.

title: Take Shelter
subTitle: Plagued by nightmares, Curtis builds a storm shelter, acting on visions that jeopardise his family's stability and harmony.

title: Modern Times
subTitle: A factory production line worker is thrown out on the street for his manic behaviour. He then meets a young, homeless girl, who is recently orphaned, and tries to build a home with her.

title: Tom & Jerry
subTitle: Jerry, a mischievous mouse, takes refuge in a fancy hotel that is set to host a wedding. In order to get rid of him, one of the event planners hires Jerry's feline rival, Tom.

title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
subTitle: Sam and Mikaela once again join forces with Optimus Prime and the Autobots to save Earth from The Fallen, the ruthless robot who teams up with the Decepticons.

title: Kung Fu Hustle
subTitle: An aspiring gangster pretends to be part of a notorious gang and tries to terrorise a neighbourhood. However, unknown to him, three martial arts experts live there and are ready to take him down.

title: Shazam! Fury of the Gods
subTitle: Bestowed with superpowers, Shazam and his foster siblings join forces against the daughters of Atlas who have stolen the Wizard's broken staff.

title: Mission: Impossible -- Ghost Protocol
subTitle: Ethan Hunt, an expert agent, confronts a worldwide plot. To prevent a nuclear crisis, he collaborates secretly with his team after his organisation is deceived.

title: Rush Hour 3
subTitle: Inspector Lee and Detective Carter arrive in Paris following an assassination attempt on Ambassador Han. There, they encounter a woman who may hold the key to uncovering the Triad's secret leaders.

title: Piranha 3DD
subTitle: The bloodthirsty piranhas head towards a local water park. Amidst the fun-seeking horde at the park are friends Maddy, Barry and Kyle who decide to take on the man-eating creatures.

title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1
subTitle: After putting an end to the dystopian Hunger Games, Katniss Everdeen and her friends attempt to rescue a brainwashed companion and free their nation from the control of President Coriolanus Snow.

title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1
subTitle: After putting an end to the dystopian Hunger Games, Katniss Everdeen and her friends attempt to rescue a brainwashed companion and free their nation from the control of President Coriolanus Snow.

title: Sabotage
subTitle: John Wharton, the captain of an elite task force, raids a safe house owned by one of the most lethal drug cartels with his team. Though the mission is successful, death awaits them.

title: The Giver
subTitle: Jonas, a young man, trains under an elder in order to become the keeper of his community's memories. However, things get complicated once he discovers the sinister side of his city.

title: The Transporter Refueled
subTitle: Frank Martin, a former mercenary, is hired by a woman and her accomplices to fulfil a contract. Soon, however, he must join forces with them to bring down a Russian crime lord.

title: The Kidnapping of Freddy Heineken
subTitle: A gang of childhood friends make a plan to abduct one of the richest men on the earth and demand the largest ransom ever paid for any kidnapping.

title: Born to Fight
subTitle: Dan Barnes, a former professional boxer, takes up the responsibility to coach Matthew Miller, a teenager who is repeatedly bullied by a school boxing champion and his friends.

title: Godzilla
subTitle: When Ford and his father uncover proof of monstrous creatures, the world is thrust into chaos when they rise from the deep. However, an ancient titan, Godzilla, awakens to restore balance.
